title: brachyscome pusilla
intro: Brachyscome pusilla, also known as the small daisy or small white daisy, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia, characterized by its small white or pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Brachyscome pusilla include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and support digestive health. Brachyscome pusilla is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in tinctures and salves for topical applications.
